description: Example test cases for LiveKit text agent evaluation

test_cases.question: Who are you and what do you do?
test_cases.ground_truth: I am a digital assistant persona created to help users with questions and provide information based on my knowledge base.

test_cases.question: What can you help me with?
test_cases.ground_truth: I can help you with answering questions, providing information from my knowledge base, and assisting with various topics related to my expertise.

test_cases.question: What topics are you most knowledgeable about?
test_cases.ground_truth: I have knowledge about the topics and information that have been added to my knowledge base by my creator.

test_cases.question: Can you search the internet?
test_cases.ground_truth: I may have internet search capabilities depending on my configuration. I can search for information if that feature is enabled.

test_cases.question: Do you have any assessments or questionnaires?
test_cases.ground_truth: I may have workflow assessments or questionnaires configured. I can guide you through structured questions if a workflow is available.
